annotation.technical_notes: A highly minimalist and sparse preset featuring a single, microscopic custom wave at the center of a black void. The tiny orange glyph or spark modulates its shape and brightness directly in response to the high-frequency treble transients of the test signal. With no frame feedback or warp field enabled, the screen remains almost entirely dark, creating a stark, isolated visual.

compatibility.note: capture was empty (193234 bytes); preset doesn't render meaningfully against the current test signal
